programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Un'autobomba uccide il capo di una gang e sua moglie. La Squadra Uno, credendo che si tratti di un atto di una gang rivale, scopre presto che è stato perpetrato dai membri della stessa banda del leader.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Un giovane con una memoria brillante viene rapito e costretto a ricordare le specifiche di una nuova “pistola intelligente”, che i suoi rapitori intendono vendere sul mercato nero.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: La Squadra Uno deve fermare alcuni ex soldati che stanno rapinando un furgone blindato con milioni di dollari. Vengono a conoscenza del background del leader del gruppo che cerca di dare un posto agli ex militari che non hanno un posto dove andare.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Durante un'escursione con Greg e Ed, Dean e Clark ricevono l'ordine di rimanere in auto quando scoppia una sparatoria in una piazza di spaccio.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Un senatore vuole costruire un aeroporto su un terreno agricolo occupato. Il proprietario non vuole spostarsi perché è l'unica vita che suo nipote sordo conosce. Il senatore viene rapito perché il contadino possa parlargli.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: La Squadra Uno ha il compito di catturare un uomo disturbato e armato su un traghetto.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Un uomo piazza degli esplosivi in edifici pubblici dove può causare la massima distruzione.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: La squadra rintraccia l'attentatore che ha seminato il panico in città. È un ex psichiatra e ha un giubbotto esplosivo.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Quando un pistolero arrabbiato prende in ostaggio una persona in una piazza pubblica, la squadra deve agire in modo drastico e affrontare le conseguenze.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Un padre disperato punta la pistola di un poliziotto su una squadra di chirurghi, obbligandoli a un trapianto di cuore per la figlia morente.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Un padre disperato punta la pistola di un poliziotto su una squadra di chirurghi, obbligandoli a un trapianto di cuore per la figlia morente.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: La squadra fa di tutto per salvare un poliziotto preso in ostaggio sulla sua barca, ma presto scopre che il rapitore è la sorella maggiore della moglie maltrattata.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Un rapinatore di banche che potrebbe non essere chi dice di essere mette alla prova le capacità di negoziazione del sergente Parker, mentre il resto della squadra si sforza di determinare ciò che vuole davvero.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Una sparatoria in un centro commerciale porta la squadra in una situazione che coinvolge la vendetta di una gang e una ragazza che sta cercando di farcela nonostante tutto.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: La squadra risponde ai colpi sparati dalla casa di un avvocato che viene però protetto dalla sua famiglia.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Ed è in servizio al palazzo di giustizia, quando una persona in libertà vigilata chiede, mentre tiene un ostaggio sotto tiro, di vedere il procuratore che lo ha mandato in prigione.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Durante il tentativo di salvare una ragazza rapita, la squadra trova un altro ostaggio e Jules deve riuscire a salvare entrambi.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Il compito apparentemente facile della squadra diventa complesso, dal momento che la moglie del VIP che stanno proteggendo è equipaggiata con una bomba.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Il compito apparentemente facile della squadra diventa complesso, dal momento che la moglie del VIP che stanno proteggendo è equipaggiata con una bomba.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Una moglie prende in ostaggio una donna credendo che abbia una relazione con suo marito. Il sergente Parker è a capo della tattica, mentre Sam fa il negoziatore.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Una moglie prende in ostaggio una donna credendo che abbia una relazione con suo marito. Il sergente Parker è a capo della tattica, mentre Sam fa il negoziatore.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: L'SRU è divisa tra due crisi quando una bomba mette in pericolo una stazione ferroviaria e la loro sede è presa in ostaggio.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Prairie Moon
programme.desc: When Deputy Sheriff Gene Autry agrees to become the guardian of a dying friend's three young sons from Chicago, he soon learns that the boys are a pack of ruffians and not the least bit impressed with cowboys and ranch life.

programme.title: Home In Wyomin’
programme.desc: Radio star Gene Autry must solve a murder mystery at the Frontier Days pageant in Wyoming that involves a newspaper photographer, Chicago gangsters, a deserted mine, and a surprise ending.

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who don't know their land holds lots of gold, Gene puts a stop to it.

programme.title: Under Fiesta Stars
programme.desc: Gene Autry and a spirited gal jointly inherit a ranch and mine. When crooks inquire, she wants to sell, but Gene wants to work the mine. It takes Gene's charm and talent for her to see things his way.

programme.title: Return Of The Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Wild Bill
programme.desc: Wild Bill focuses on the last days of gunfighter, Wild Bill Hickok, consorting in Deadwood with Calamity Jane, observed by a longtime friend, and haunted by the ghosts of his past, from an old flame to a young man who announces his intention to kill Bill.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers (1959)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: The Kentuckian
programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.title: The Kentuckian
programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: Riders Of The Whistling Pines
programme.desc: Gene Autry believes he has accidentally shot a man, but learns that the guilt lies with men trying to stop a destructive moth infestation. Will modern chemicals be used to save the day, against Gene?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes' explorations take them to the seven Grapefruit Islands, where they learn that the islands' famous fruit has been disappearing! Ash, Misty, and Tracey set out to catch whoever's responsible.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When divers recover an ancient Orange League Championship trophy, our heroes head straight for the art museum where it's on display to check it out! Unfortunately, Team Rocket has beaten them to the punch…

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Team Rocket crashes on an island, Meowth is the center of attention when the locals mistake him for the 'Great Meowth of Bounty,' a powerful creature spoken of in prophecy. What will happen when they learn the truth?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Misty is not pleased when our heroes land on an island swarming with Bug-type Pokémon, though Ash and Tracey are having a blast. When they find an injured Scyther, can Misty overcome her disgust and help out?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash and friends find a wonderful island brimming with many kinds of fruit trees, they decide to take a break and enjoy the bounty! Of course, Team Rocket has other ideas…

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a couple of Trainers who don't seem to get along at all, even though their Nidoran are obviously smitten with each other. Misty is determined to solve this romantic challenge!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Slogging through a thunderstorm, our heroes notice a group of Magnemite soaking up electricity from the lightning bolts. When they finally get into town to rest, there's a blackout! Can the Magnemite help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: In Trovitopolis City, Ash and friends hear stories about some kind of monster that's been scaring everyone—and when the ground cracks open and dumps them in the sewer, it seems they might meet this monster face to face!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After Misty dives into a whirlpool to rescue a girl, she learns that the girl's brother, Rudy, has a giant crush on her. Things get more complicated when it turns out he's also the Gym Leader Ash must challenge next!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash and friends go in search of super-sized Pokémon, but when they fall for a Team Rocket trick, and then Pikachu and Meowth get snatched up by a giant Pidgeot, everyone must work together to get them back!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After hearing about Ash from the Trovita Island Gym Leader, another Trainer seeks him out for a battle...and after Pikachu is knocked out, Ash turns to his Charizard. But can he get the unruly Pokémon to listen to him?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes’ plans are interrupted by a raging fire in a nearby warehouse. When they try to fight the flames, they quickly find themselves in need of the local fire department: Team Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Snorlax's Poké Ball breaks, Ash has a huge problem on his hands: How can our heroes get the slumbering Snorlax over a mountain pass to the nearest Pokémon Center?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash is anxious to win the final badge of the Orange League, and soon gets a taste of this Gym Leader’s strength as she helps him fend off another Team Rocket sneak attack!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Discovering a scientist’s submarine at sea, our heroes are soon surrounded by his life’s research: a school of splashing Magikarp! They want to help him study Magikarp Evolution, but Team Rocket has other ideas…

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: With Ash and Tracey paralyzed by a wild Vileplume’s Stun Spore, it’s up to Misty to find a local plant and save the day!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: With his four Orange League badges in hand, Ash has one last challenge to face before he can be crowned Champion of the Orange League. Does he have what it takes?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash’s battle for the Orange League Winner’s Trophy rages on, and it soon becomes apparent that he will have to take on a powerful Dragonite to become the Orange League Champion!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Trying to rescue a local school of Lapras from would-be poachers, our heroes must find a way to convince these distrustful Pokémon they are friends...before it’s too late!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: With Pallet Town on their minds, our heroes are searching for a ferry, but soon discover the port is abandoned...except for some explosive Electrode! Can Ash stop Team Rocket before the ferry goes up in smoke?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash has an eventful homecoming with a surprise visit from an old friend, a visit to see Professor Oak, and a Team Rocket raid. There’s no place like home!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After Gary comes to the rescue against Team Rocket, Ash seizes an opportunity…at long last, our hero gets to challenge his rival to their very first Pokémon battle!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash begins his journey in Johto, a region largely unexplored and populated with Pokémon entirely new to him and his friends.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: On the road again, Ash and his Charizard soundly defeat an ambitious rookie Trainer named Casey. Upset, she runs away before Ash can comfort her—the perfect time for Team Rocket to strike!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: In a forest that's being destroyed by rampaging Pinsir, Ash has to enlist the help of the local Heracross to protect their home! But it turns out these Pokémon look tougher than they act…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: On their way to Violet City, our heroes arrive in a valley where Donphan are used to harvest precious stones. Needless to say, the Team Rocket villains aren't far behind them!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The forest can be a scary place at night, especially when you’re lost! Our heroes will need some help to get out of this mess. It's Hoothoot to the rescue!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: On their first stop in a city since New Bark Town, our heroes decide to help an insecure Bellossom dance troupe regain their confidence and perform in an upcoming exhibition!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash and the gang arrive in a town besieged by apparent copycat crimes mimicking a legendary master thief. The town’s hopes lie with these young Trainers...how can they stop this criminal duo and their Meowth accomplice?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When our heroes return an unhappy Snubbull to its wealthy Trainer, it sparks off a series of events that will change the Pokémon’s life forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When our heroes return an unhappy Snubbull to its wealthy Trainer, it sparks off a series of events that will change the Pokémon’s life forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When Brock discovers a hurt and frightened Stantler in a nearby park, he decides to nurse it back to health. But with Jessie, James and Meowth on his case, can he keep Stantler safe?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When Brock discovers a hurt and frightened Stantler in a nearby park, he decides to nurse it back to health. But with Jessie, James and Meowth on his case, can he keep Stantler safe?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Still on the road to Violet City, Ash encounters a wild Chikorita and tries to catch it. Chikorita proves to be a tougher opponent than he originally thought, and things only get worse when Team Rocket arrives…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Still on the road to Violet City, Ash encounters a wild Chikorita and tries to catch it. Chikorita proves to be a tougher opponent than he originally thought, and things only get worse when Team Rocket arrives…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Professor Oak’s errand to deliver the mysterious GS Ball to a Poké Ball expert is interrupted when a Quagsire with an eye for round objects steals the GS Ball for a nocturnal ritual…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Professor Oak’s errand to deliver the mysterious GS Ball to a Poké Ball expert is interrupted when a Quagsire with an eye for round objects steals the GS Ball for a nocturnal ritual…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Under yet another Team Rocket ambush, a young Trainer and her Ledyba help our heroes see them off. But, amidst the chaos, her Ledyba get separated from the group—where could they be?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Under yet another Team Rocket ambush, a young Trainer and her Ledyba help our heroes see them off. But, amidst the chaos, her Ledyba get separated from the group—where could they be?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Our heroes make a rest stop in a Pokémon Center, which is run by a kind-hearted but misguided Blissey. Things only get worse when an old friend of Blissey's drops in unexpectedly…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Our heroes make a rest stop in a Pokémon Center, which is run by a kind-hearted but misguided Blissey. Things only get worse when an old friend of Blissey's drops in unexpectedly…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Finally reaching Violet City, Ash’s search for the Gym is halted by a trip to the local Pokémon Academy. Ash does well playing teacher, until one pupil takes off with Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Finally reaching Violet City, Ash’s search for the Gym is halted by a trip to the local Pokémon Academy. Ash does well playing teacher, until one pupil takes off with Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: It’s finally time for Ash’s first Johto League Gym battle, and he’s feeling confident. But Falkner’s Flying-type Pokémon prove to be tough competition! Can Ash take the win—and his first Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: It’s finally time for Ash’s first Johto League Gym battle, and he’s feeling confident. But Falkner’s Flying-type Pokémon prove to be tough competition! Can Ash take the win—and his first Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Back on the road after his first Johto Gym badge win, Ash and the gang find a cute Marill that won’t stop crying! Nothing our heroes try will stop it, and a Team Rocket raid certainly won’t help!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Back on the road after his first Johto Gym badge win, Ash and the gang find a cute Marill that won’t stop crying! Nothing our heroes try will stop it, and a Team Rocket raid certainly won’t help!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Team Rocket’s latest invention is bound to be a hit...until Togepi and its newfound Sentret friend take it out for a spin!

programme.desc: Team Rocket’s latest invention is bound to be a hit...until Togepi and its newfound Sentret friend take it out for a spin!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash hears of a training ground for wild Charizard and decides it's just the place to hone his own Charizard’s strength. But the tough lessons to be learned there will change Ash and Charizard’s friendship forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Back on the road to the Azalea Gym, our heroes discover a Sunflora festival in a nearby town and meet a Trainer whose Sunflora is too sad to compete. Can Ash and the gang put a smile on its face?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: An inexperienced young Trainer has managed to scare off his own Farfetch’d. Our heroes are happy to help him out, but they'll have to find it before Team Rocket does!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: An unexpected Pokémon firefighting competition reunites our heroes with some old friends, the Squirtle Squad! But they are in desperate need of some leadership, so Ash and Squirtle rejoin the ranks.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Un homme voit sa famille dérobée et agressée devant ses yeux, l'assaillant est abattu. Les Reagan se demandent alors jusqu'où ils iraient pour défendre leur famille.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Un inspecteur et ami des Reagan est tué. Linda et les garçons s'inquiètent pour Danny, qui en fait une affaire personnelle, au détriment de sa santé mentale.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Une grande journaliste et amie de Frank manque de se faire agresser alors qu'elle est en reportage en ville, Danny et Jackie tentent de trouver l'auteur des faits.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin plaide contre une femme accusée d'avoir tué son mari, l'avocat de la défense est tué et l'enquête est confiée à Danny.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny se retrouve dans une position difficile quand une arme utilisée lors d'un braquage fait partie du programme de rachat d'armes de la NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny fait parler de lui en travaillant sur une affaire classée : le suicide d'un pompier, à la demande du fils de 12 ans de ce dernier.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny et Jackie doivent protéger le témoin clé d'un procès de la mafia russe, mais quand elle manque de se faire tuer, ils réalisent qu'il y a une fuite dans les forces opérationnelles.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny et Jackie enquêtent sur la mort suspecte d'un gros investisseur, blessé en se battant. Ses mains n'en montrent pourtant aucune trace.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank doit absolument stopper une attaque à l'arme biologique à New York, tout en le cachant à sa famille durant leur moment le plus cher : la fête des mères.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin et Danny enquêtent sur l'affaire classée d'une femme agressée par son compagnon riche et puissant, qui n'a jamais été condamné.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Un dangereux criminel du passé du Danny revient se venger et enlève Jackie. Jamie, lui, rencontre son nouveau coéquipier

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny pense qu'un serial killer court dans la nature quand deux victimes de meurtres différentes sont identifiées comme des membres d'un groupe accusé de viol collectif.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.sub-title: Le plus beau jour de leur vie
programme.desc: Danny et Jackie enquêtent sur le meurtre d'une mariée le jour de son mariage suite à une fusillade. L'affaire leur est retirée, et ils sont réaffectés sur la protection d'un président d'Amérique centrale qui est la cible d'une tentative d'assassinat.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Peu après que Frank a remis une médaille d'honneur à un inspecteur de la NYPD pour son infiltration en Malaisie , ce dernier est pris en otage par un baron de la drogue malaisien dont il a envoyé le frère en prison.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Le témoin clé d'Erin, un grand photographe, manque de se faire tuer dans sa fuite. Elle demande à Danny d'assurer sa protection.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Un homme armé d'un couteau déguisé en Baron Samedi, l'esprit de la mort, poignarde un autre homme déguisé à Halloween, Danny entre alors dans l'univers vaudou.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny trouve le corps d'un étudiant sur un campus, probablement trafiquant de drogues.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny et Kate n'ont aucune piste après une fusillade, mais Linda pourrait bien les aider après avoir entendu la victime donner le nom du coupable à son prêtre.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny et Kate n'ont aucune piste après une fusillade, mais Linda pourrait bien les aider après avoir entendu la victime donner le nom du coupable à son prêtre.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Deux automobilistes aux voitures polluantes sont tués par un sniper, Danny et Kate sont à la recherche du suspect que la ville pense être un serial killer écologiste radical.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Deux automobilistes aux voitures polluantes sont tués par un sniper, Danny et Kate sont à la recherche du suspect que la ville pense être un serial killer écologiste radical.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: La voiture de Danny correspond à la description de la NYPD d'un véhicule impliqué dans un trafic de drogue. Il est emmené en garde à vue quand de la cocaïne est découverte dans son coffre.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Un homme avec de multiples morsures de rats est jeté d'une voiture, Danny tente de découvrir pourquoi et qui essaie d'envoyer un message.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny trouve un homme désorienté au parc, couvert du sang de sa compagne. Il a du mal à croire que l'homme peine à se souvenir de la nuit passée, jusqu'à ce qu'un puissant narcotique soit détecté dans son sang.

programme.title: Zone Interdite
programme.desc: Zone Interdite est depuis trente ans le magazine qui documente et décrypte les bouleversements de la société française. Réalisées sur la durée, les enquêtes diffusées révèlent les tabous, les passions et les combats des Français au cœur de l'actualité.

programme.title: Enquêtes Criminelles
programme.desc: Nathalie Renoux vous propose de vivre ou de revivre de grandes affaires criminelles qui font ou qui ont fait l'actualité. Qu'elles soient connues ou qu'elles le soient moins, les histoires que vous verrez racontent à chaque fois comment la vie de gens ord
